blocks.html:
Prior to release, feedback on scope, completeness, accuracy, and
presentation of the analysis was solicited from scientific experts in
each of the areas covered by the report. Experts were invited to comment
on one or several chapters of the report. The authors of each chapter
retained final editorial authority over the content and integration of
expert feedback. Providing review comments does not imply endorsement of
the report’s overall findings or conclusions. Experts were given the
option to be publicly acknowledged in this report. Reviewers who agreed
to be acknowledged were (in alphabetical order):
Rocco Casagrande, Gryphon Scientific
Matthew Wook Chang, National University of Singapore
George M. Church, Harvard University
Gitta L. Coaker, University of California, Davis
Jeffery L. Dangl, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
Drew Endy, Stanford University
Jeff Gore, Massachusetts Institute of Technology
Chuan He, University of Chicago
Sheng Yang He, Duke University
Kenya Honda, Keio University
Wilhelm T. S. Huck, Radboud University
Jonathan C. Kagan, Harvard University
Michael S. Kay, University of Utah
Simon A. Levin, Princeton University
Robert D. Miller, University of New Mexico
John H. Rex, AMR.Solutions
Daniel Simberloff, University of Tennessee, Knoxville
James M. Tiedje, Michigan State University
Paul E. Turner, Yale University
J. Craig Venter, J. Craig Venter Institute
